# Check all conditions for eligibility
        return (self.gender in ['male', 'female', 'gender neutral'] and
                self.age >= 30 and
                self.age <= 60 and
                self.race in ['white', 'black', 'hispanic'] and
                self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired'] and
                self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
                self.marital_status in ['single', 'married'] and
                self.religion in ['christianity', 'islam', 'hinduism', 'buddhism'] and
                self.media_studies_degree == 'yes')
